email_outreach.description: End-to-end: enrichment fetch + email generation + HubSpot write

sms_scheduling.description: Inbound SMS receive + intent parse + calendar slot offer + booking confirmation

notes: p50 and p95 computed from Langfuse trace telemetry. Enrichment pipeline dominates total latency. Job-post scraping via Playwright is the bottleneck; async parallelization reduces total enrichment from ~8s sequential to ~3.9s parallel.
